summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Live Lifecycle feature (Phase 11) - critical bug fix for stale live data. Backend and frontend both working correctly with 100% test pass rate.

backend_issues.notes: All backend endpoints working correctly. GET /api/matches/live returns only valid matches with correct _live_state and _freshness. POST /api/live/reevaluate correctly returns 409 for stale matches.

frontend_issues.notes: All UI components rendering correctly. LiveStateBadge shows real minute labels (33', 49', 51', 68', 84', 90') - NOT all fixed at 90'. GARBAGE_TIME matches correctly show warning and hide reevaluate panel. Freshness badges and provenance badges all working.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/matches/live returns correct structure (count, sport, items, archived_count, cache_ttl_sec, computed_at)
Backend: Each item has _live_state with correct shape (state, minute, minute_label, valid, reason, status_short, heartbeat_age_sec)
Backend: Each item has _freshness with correct shape (score 0-100, label, components, heartbeat_age_sec)
Backend: No stale matches (2H+95min or old heartbeat >10min) are returned
Backend: POST /api/live/reevaluate returns 409 with live_state for stale match 1516348 (heartbeat 432520s old)
Backend: Multi-sport support works (basketball TTL=30s, baseball TTL=45s)
Frontend: LivePage renders with correct title 'Partidos en vivo'
Frontend: Big Five filter works (shows 1/8 initially, 8 after clicking 'Ver todas')
Frontend: LiveStateBadge shows real minute labels (33', 49', 51', 68', 84', 90') - NOT all fixed at 90'
Frontend: LiveFreshnessBadge shows scores (65, 80) with Spanish labels (Datos frescos, Datos retrasados)
Frontend: ProvenanceBadge shows 'Fuente: API-Sports' for all matches
Frontend: GARBAGE_TIME matches (3) show warning 'Tiempo muerto' and hide LiveReevalPanel
Frontend: LIVE_ACTIVE matches (5) show LiveReevalPanel with 'Reevaluar ahora' button
Frontend: Console logs show [LIVE_MATCH_VALIDATION] with correct counts (received=8, valid=8, archived_server=35)

critical_bug_fix_verified.issue: Live section showing matches at minute 90' that already ended (stale data)
critical_bug_fix_verified.fix_implemented: Backend live_lifecycle.py with strict validation + sweep, frontend liveValidation.js with client-side mirror
critical_bug_fix_verified.verification: Confirmed real minute labels (33', 49', 51', 68', 84', 90') displayed - NOT all fixed at 90'. Stale matches correctly filtered and archived (35 archived).

backend_validation.live_endpoint: Returns 8 valid matches with _live_state (valid=true) and _freshness (score 65-80, labels DATOS_FRESCOS/DATOS_RETRASADOS)
backend_validation.reevaluate_gate: Returns 409 for stale match 1516348 with error='live_match_not_active' and live_state payload
backend_validation.multi_sport: Basketball TTL=30s, Baseball TTL=45s, Football TTL=60s all correct

frontend_validation.live_state_badges: All 8 matches show LiveStateBadge with correct state (GARBAGE_TIME or LIVE_ACTIVE) and real minute labels
frontend_validation.freshness_badges: All 8 matches show LiveFreshnessBadge with score + Spanish label
frontend_validation.garbage_time_handling: 3 GARBAGE_TIME matches correctly show warning and hide reevaluate panel
frontend_validation.active_match_handling: 5 LIVE_ACTIVE matches correctly show reevaluate panel

console_validation.live_match_validation: Logs show received=8, valid=8, archived_client=0, archived_server=35
console_validation.sport_switch: Logs show correct sport switching behavior
